Section Header: Subjective Index of Physical and Social Outcome (SIPSO)
Field Label: Please answer all questions based on your experience since your stroke.
1. Since your stroke, how much difficulty do you have dressing yourself fully?
Choices: 4, No difficulty at all | 3, Slight difficulty | 2, Some difficulty | 1, A lot of difficulty | 0, I cannot dress myself fully

Field Label: 2. Since your stroke, how much difficulty do you have moving around all areas of the home?
Choices: 4, No difficulty at all | 3, Slight difficulty | 2, Some difficulty | 1, A lot of difficulty | 0, I cannot move around all areas of the home

Field Label: 3. Since your stroke, how satisfied are you with your overall ability to perform daily activities in and around the home?
Choices: 4, Completely satisfied | 3, Mostly satisfied | 2, Fairly satisfied | 1, Not very satisfied | 0, Completely dissatisfied

Field Label: 4. Since your stroke, how much difficulty do you have shopping for and carrying a few items (1 bag of shopping or less) when at the shops?
Choices: 4, No difficulty at all | 3, Slight difficulty | 2, Some difficulty | 1, A lot of difficulty | 0, I cannot shop for and carry a few items

Field Label: 5. Since your stroke, how independent are you in your ability to move around your local neighbourhood?
Choices: 4, I am completely independent | 3, I prefer to have someone else with me | 2, I need occasional assistance from someone | 1, I need assistance much of the time | 0, I am completely dependent on others

Field Label: 6. Since your stroke, how often do you feel bored with your free time at home?
Choices: 4, I am never bored with my free time | 3, A little of my free time | 2, Some of my free time | 1, Most of my free time | 0, All of my free time

Field Label: 7. Since your stroke, how would you describe the amount of communication between you and your friends/associates?
Choices: 4, A great deal | 3, Quite a lot | 2, Some | 1, A little bit | 0, None

Field Label: 8. Since your stroke, how satisfied are you with the level of interests and activities you share with your friends/associates?
Choices: 4, Completely satisfied | 3, Mostly satisfied | 2, Fairly satisfied | 1, Not very satisfied | 0, Completely dissatisfied

Field Label: 9. Since your stroke, how often do you visit friends/others?
Choices: 4, Most days | 3, At least once a week | 2, At least once a fortnight | 1, Once a month or less | 0, Never

Field Label: 10. Since your stroke, how do you feel about your appearance when out in public?
Choices: 4, Perfectly happy | 3, Slightly self-conscious | 2, Fairly self-conscious | 1, Very self-conscious | 0, I try to avoid going out in public
